COMES NEXT [ ](https://alignba.com/) Your browser does not support the video tag. ### Whether you're considering growth or exit strategies, explore your options with Align Business Advisory Services, a top-rated Mergers & Acquisitions (M&A) Advisory Firm for lower-middle-market businesses. [ Request a Meeting ](https://alignba.com/contact-us/) [ View Our Deals ](https://alignba.com/our-services/transaction-management/) ## Industries We Serve Include ![heart favicon](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/Group-42.svg) ##### Healthcare ![briefcase icon](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/Group-47.svg) ##### Business Services ![favicon](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/Group-43.svg) ##### Industrial Services ![supermarket icon](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/supermarket-1.svg) ##### Consumer Goods & Services ![icon](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/Group-44.svg) ##### Manufacturing ![food icon](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/Group-45.svg) ##### Food & Beverage ## Clients We Serve ### $10-$250MM Revenue ### +10% EBITDA ### Founder or Owner-operated ### Niche Market Leaders ## You’ve built a successful business - now it’s time to explore what’s next. The market is shifting, and new opportunities are emerging. Maybe you’re thinking about selling your company, but you: * Aren’t sure if this is the right time to sell your business. * Want to ensure your employees and legacy are protected. * Don’t yet have clarity on your next chapter. * Need expert guidance on your exit strategy and options. What if you could move forward with confidence, partnering with an experienced M&A advisory team that helps you realize the full value of your life’s work and design the future you want? ![handshake icon](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/partnership-handshake.svg) ##### Mergers & Acquisitions Aligning buyers and sellers in successful transactions. [View More](https://alignba.com/our-services/mergers-and-acquisitions-consulting/) ![talk icon](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/talk.svg) ##### Management Consulting Helping your company become an even better version of itself. [View More](https://alignba.com/our-services/management-consulting/) ![idea icon](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/idea-1.svg) ##### Business Strategy Taking ownership of the next chapter of your story. [View More](https://alignba.com/our-services/business-strategy/) ![money icon](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/money-6.svg) ##### Finance Creating a world-class finance function for your business. [View More](https://alignba.com/our-services/finance/) ## Make the right decision at the right time with Align Business Advisory Services. Change is daunting, especially when you’ve invested in building something both profitable and personal. Align’s business approach will not just help you find the right buyer, we also ensure you are: * Making the right decision at the right time. * Leaving behind a lasting, impactful legacy. * Finding the freedom to start your next chapter. * Confident that what’s next can be even better than what you already accomplished. [ Request a Meeting ](https://alignba.com/contact-us/) [ View Our Deals ](https://alignba.com/our-services/transaction-management/) ## Align Business Advisory Services has closed over $3 billion in transactions across a wide range of industries. At Align, we know how important your life’s work is to you. As a team full of entrepreneurs, former business owners, executives, and operators, we have been where you are and understand the uncertainty of what comes next. That’s why we do what we do. ## Press & Awards ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/abaa.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/2019-company-to-watch.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/forbes.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/ma-advisor-award-winner-resized.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/co-100.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Florida-500-winner-100px.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/inc.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/mergers-acquisitions.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/womenwho-mean-business.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/entrepreneur.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/stevie-awards.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/florida-companies-to-watch.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/fast-company.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/chief-executive.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/ceoworld-magazine.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/cbe.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/amaa.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/abaa.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/2019-company-to-watch.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/forbes.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/ma-advisor-award-winner-resized.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/co-100.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Florida-500-winner-100px.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/inc.png) ![](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/mergers-acquisitions.png) " They taught us so much and opened doors we never could have imagined would be open to us. " ### CEO, Business Services Testimonial Slide 1Testimonial Slide 2Testimonial Slide 3Testimonial Slide 4Testimonial Slide 5 [ Request a Meeting ](https://alignba.com/contact-us/) [ View Our Deals ](https://alignba.com/our-services/transaction-management/) ## Getting Started with Align is Simple ![speech-bubble](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/01/speech-bubble.png) #### [ Discuss your unique industry and business. ](https://alignba.com/contact-us/ "Discuss your unique industry and business.") ![vision-our-vision-icon](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/01/vision-our-vision-icon-150x150.png) #### Identify how you envision your next chapter. ![write icon](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/write.svg) #### Create a tailored plan for you. ![project icon](https://alignba.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/project.svg) #### We turn the page together. ## M&A is what we do. We work to ensure our clients are prepared before, during, and after an M&A transaction. Most of our clients do not have a full C-Suite of executives, but they still need those types of resources to address the complex and ever-changing components of their business. We provide a suite of business advisory services to help our clients maximize the value of their enterprise. After all, M&A is not about what something costs, it is about what it is worth. Most of Align’s compensation relies on a successful sale, so you don’t pay when we don’t perform. Your restlessness and worry about the future won’t fade if you stay stagnant. Capitalize on the current seller’s market and achieve true closure and freedom as you move into your next phase with Align Business Advisory Services.
